chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-6527 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 25.08.2025 Mr. Riaz Ali, advocate for the petitioners Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- The main grievance of learned counsel for the petitioner is the letter dated 09.11.2021 addressed to the Executive Director, JPMC, Karachi, has not been responded to. Learned counsel for the petitioner would be satisfied if the Executive Director, JPMC, is directed to reply to his request which is at Page- 107 of the file. Learned AAG has no objection to such proposition. Order accordingly. A copy of this order shall be forwarded to the Executive Director, JPMC alongwith a letter, which is at Page 107 of the file, who shall make a reply/determine any request in the aforesaid letter within 03 months of the date of this order through a speaking order after giving the petitioner an opportunity of hearing. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Executive Director, JPMC, for compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
